0.name: ctxdump
0.description: AI context orchestrator. Extracts a zero-ambiguity, secret-scrubbed, semantically ordered dump of any repository for LLM ingestion.

1.name: cdn-static
1.description: Stateless CLI to manage a self-hosted CDN vault over SSH. Pushes local files or remote URLs to a VPS, mutates the remote manifest, and restarts the serving container.

2.name: wbc
2.description: Archival engine. Submits URLs to the Wayback Machine and tracks job status with atomic local state. Optional gum-powered TUI command center.

3.name: gtrap
3.description: Sovereign identity provisioner. Generates Ed25519 SSH + GPG keypairs, configures ~/.ssh/config, installs a persistent systemd SSH agent, and registers tokens with Forgejo.

4.name: audit-fs
4.description: Static filesystem auditor. Enforces naming conventions across a project tree. Supports JSON output, depth limiting, and .auditignore exclusion files.

5.name: dock-val
5.description: Pre-commit validation engine. Runs shellcheck purity checks, Docker Compose syntax validation, and hardcoded secret detection against staged files.

6.name: harvester
6.description: Go binary that polls docker stats every minute via cron and writes container CPU/memory telemetry to a JSON state file served over a zero-trust tunnel.
